dialog.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this child? This action cannot be undone.

Hero.title: Discover your child’s intelligence and guide it right
Hero.subtitle: A comprehensive learning platform connecting family, schools, and institutions to assess children’s skills, analyze strengths, and provide personalized learning paths in a safe, organized environment.
Hero.cardsTitle: Choose your account type to get started

Enricher.label: Enricher
Enricher.description: Create engaging content and contribute to learning journeys.

Beneficiary.label: Organization
Beneficiary.description: Manage groups and programs and measure impact with clear reports.

tests.title: Accredited assessments
tests.description: A curated set of accurate, easy assessments to evaluate each child’s abilities.

reports.title: Clear reports
reports.description: Rich results and actionable insights that give you a complete picture.

dashboards.title: Multiple dashboards
dashboards.description: Role-based dashboards that make management and follow-up simple.

HowItWorks.title: How does Ithraa work?
HowItWorks.subtitle: A simple journey that helps you discover and nurture a child’s strengths.

evaluate.title: Run intelligence assessments
evaluate.description: A set of structured tests to identify strengths and core skills.

map.title: Get a full intelligence map
map.description: Understand the child’s abilities clearly and build the right learning plan.

recommend.title: Smart activities & paths
recommend.description: Recommendations that match the child’s level and support steady growth.

track.title: Track progress and development
track.description: Follow improvement over time and adjust the path as needed.

t1.name: Sarah Abdulaziz
t1.quote: A smooth experience and very clear results. It helped me understand my child better.

t2.name: Yasser Mostafa
t2.quote: The reports are practical and the learning paths are thoughtfully designed.

t3.name: Noura AlHarbi
t3.quote: Great dashboards and follow-up tools. Implementation was straightforward.

t4.name: Ahmed Ali
t4.quote: The platform is organized and the recommendations are genuinely helpful.

t5.name: Reem Hassan
t5.quote: Beautiful UI and a clear process—from assessment to progress tracking.

name.min: Name must be at least 2 characters.
name.max: Name must be at most 50 characters.

email.invalid: Please enter a valid email address.

password.min: Password must be at least 8 characters.
password.pattern: Password must contain uppercase, lowercase, number and special character.

phone.min: Please enter a valid phone number.

organization_name.min: Organization name must be at least 2 characters.

TypeStep.title: Choose beneficiary account type
TypeStep.subtitle: Select the account type you want to register to benefit from Ithraa.

organization.title: Organization
organization.description: Register an educational organization to manage beneficiaries and programs.

parent.title: Parent / Guardian
parent.description: Register as a parent to follow your child’s progress and results.

teacher.title: Teacher
teacher.description: Register as a teacher to manage your students and track outcomes.

Organization.title: Organization details
Organization.subtitle: Enter the account and organization details as they will appear in Ithraa.

side.title: Sign in to access your dashboard and manage your account easily.
